mapper.select: select station_id_d as station, datetime, tem as at, tem_max_24h as at_max, tem_min_24h as at_min, pre_1h as rain, pre_24h as rain24, win_d_avg_10mi as wd, win_s_avg_10mi as ws, vis, tcc as n, wep_now as ptype from public.surf_chn_mul_hor_micaps where station_id_d = #{station} and datetime >= #{dataTime} and datetime <= #{endDateTime} order by datetime

select station_id_d as station, datetime, lon, lat, tem as at, tem_max_24h as at_max, tem_min_24h as at_min, pre_1h as rain, pre_24h as rain24, win_d_avg_10mi as wd, win_s_avg_10mi as ws, vis, tcc, wep_now as ptype from public.surf_chn_mul_hor_micaps where datetime >= #{startTime} and datetime <= #{endValidDate} and station_id_d in #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into surf_chn_mul_hor_micaps (station_id_d, station_name, datetime, lon, lat, tem, tem_max_24h, tem_min_24h, pre_1h, pre, rhu, win_d_avg_10mi, win_s_avg_10mi,vis,tcc, filename,filepath,inserttime) values(#{stationNum}, #{stationName}, #{dateTime}, #{lon}, #{lat}, #{tem}, #{temMax}, #{temMin}, #{pre}, #{pre}, #{rhu}, #{wd10mi}, #{ws10mi}, #{vis},#{tcc}, #{fileName},#{filePath},#{insertTime}) on conflict (datetime,station_id_d) do update set station_id_d = #{stationNum}, station_name = #{stationName}, datetime = #{dateTime}, lon = #{lon}, lat = #{lat}, tem = #{tem}, tem_max_24h = #{temMax}, tem_min_24h = #{temMin}, pre_1h = #{pre}, pre = #{pre}, rhu = #{rhu}, win_d_avg_10mi = #{wd10mi}, win_s_avg_10mi = #{ws10mi}, vis = #{vis}, tcc = #{tcc}, filename = #{fileName}, filepath = #{filePath}, inserttime = #{insertTime}
